findings.evidence: PR lines 46-54 use only `_root_.mem_fixingSubgroup_iff`; Mathlib has `theorem mem_fixingSubgroup_iff` at `mathlib/Mathlib/GroupTheory/GroupAction/FixingSubgroup.lean:117`, with action simp lemmas `Diffeomorph.smul_def` at `code/TauCeti/Geometry/Diffeomorphism/Action.lean:58`, `Homeomorph.smul_def` at `code/TauCeti/Topology/Algebra/HomeomorphAction.lean:42`, and `toHomeomorphHom_apply` at `code/TauCeti/Geometry/Diffeomorphism/Group.lean:159`.
findings.fix: Replace it with an arbitrary-set version `... {s : Set M} ... f ∈ fixingSubgroup ... s -> toHomeomorphHom f ∈ fixingSubgroup ... s`, or keep the boundary fact as a direct specialization of that general theorem.
findings.issue: `toHomeomorphHom_mem_fixingSubgroup_boundary_of_mem_fixingSubgroup_boundary` is a special-case API for `I.boundary M`; the proof only unfolds generic pointwise fixing and the two tautological actions.

summary: The PR reuses Mathlib's `fixingSubgroup`, but the only new theorem is boundary-specific even though its proof uses no boundary-specific facts.
